headline: Webull unveils Vega — AI decision partner with plain-language voice orders, options insights, and personalised real-time alerts
the_so_what: Webull offering voice-activated trade execution, options chain analysis, and personalised portfolio alerts at zero cost to all US customers makes the AI-powered trading experience a free commodity in the retail segment — when five distinct AI capabilities ship simultaneously at no incremental cost, the feature itself ceases to be a differentiator and the underlying data flywheel becomes the moat.
summary: Webull launched Vega, the next evolution of its AI-powered decision partner for active retail traders. Vega's five confirmed capabilities: Plain-Language Orders (place trades via natural voice commands, with live interpreted details shown before confirmation); Options Statistics Insights (identifies outliers in options chains and surfaces opportunities); Portfolio Review (evaluates portfolios against investor behaviour to highlight misalignments); Vega Insights (real-time personalised analysis and alerts based on watchlists and holdings); and Data Summary (contextual market analysis in a unified platform). Available at no cost to US Webull customers.

key_stat.label: Confirmed Vega AI capabilities — including voice-activated order placement (PRNewswire, Nov 2025)

verified_claims: Webull launched Vega as 'the next evolution of its AI-powered decision partner' — PRNewswire, Nov 10, 2025
Plain-Language Orders: 'enables clients to place trades easily through natural voice commands, displaying live interpreted details before confirmation' — PRNewswire
Options Statistics Insights: identifies outliers in options chains and translates them into opportunities — PRNewswire
Portfolio Review: evaluates portfolios against investor behaviour to highlight misalignments — PRNewswire
Vega Insights: real-time personalised analysis and alerts based on watchlists and portfolios — PRNewswire
Data Summary: contextual market analysis in a unified platform — PRNewswire
Available at no cost to US Webull customers — PRNewswire
fabricated_claims: Original entry claimed 'complex multi-leg options strategies via voice command' — not present in source; removed in 2026-03-24 revision
Original entry claimed 'real-time portfolio risk analysis' — source describes Portfolio Review (behaviour misalignment), not risk analysis; corrected
_governance.notes: Source fetched and verified 2026-03-24. All claims updated to match PRNewswire press release verbatim. Original pipeline entry had unverified feature claims from truncated source; corrected via direct fetch.
